'''Wholding''' was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] participated in the [[Battle of Restuss]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Wholding was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
